description:
Recto: Obscure sentences in Judaeo-Arabic, maybe poetry, written with unusual orthography (e.g., דוכלת for توكّلت) and unusual blocky script. Might be 11th or even 10th century. Written on parchment.

Verso: Practice signatures in Judaeo-Arabic and Arabic of Abū l-Faraj Yeshuʿa b. David ha-Levi.
description_he: טקסט פרא-ספרותי בArabic, Judaeo-Arabic. מוחזק בכיא פריז.
